---
title: "Piotr Dyszewski"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/piotr-dyszewski-9b034a111/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/pdyszewski
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:piotr.dyszewski2@uwr.edu.pl
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.pl/citations?user=tJGS1iUAAAAJ&hl=en
      aria-label: Google Scholar
    - icon: person-badge
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4253-3775
      aria-label: ORCID


listing:
  - id: latest-news
    contents: "news/*.qmd"
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [date, title, description]
    max-items: 3

---

:::{#hero-heading}

I am a mathematician at the Mathematical Institute of Wrocław University. I've completed my Humboldt fellowship under the supervision of prof. Nina Gantert at the Technical University of Munich. I am mostly interested in branching and fragmentation processes. 

## Education

University of Wrocław | PhD in Mathematics | March 2014 - Sept 2018

## Experience

University of Wrocław | Assistant Professor | Oct 2021 - present

Technical University of Munich | Alexander von Humboldt Research Fellow | Oct 2020 - Sept 2021

Technical University of Munich | Wissenschaftlicher Mitarbeiter | Oct 2019 - Sept 2020

University of Wrocław | Assistant Professor | Oct 2018 - Sept 2019

:::

## News

::: {#latest-news}
:::
[old news →](news/)
